response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with proven IDE experience and solid architecture skills, but lacks the required depth in Java/Kotlin and has zero Spring ecosystem experience. Recent work (3+ years) centers on TypeScript/Node.js, not JVM tooling. Could potentially succeed with significant ramp-up time given demonstrated ability to master new technologies across D, Swift, C++, and Java.
strengths: Direct IDE experience: worked on LabWindows/CVI at National Instruments, a C IDE used by engineers globally
Strong software architecture and craftsmanship: proven expertise in TDD, clean code, microservices, and large-scale system design across multiple companies
Experience with high-performance systems: optimized systems handling millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby using low-level async I/O and caching patterns
concerns: Minimal Java depth: Java listed in skills but no substantial production Java projects in 11-year employment history; no Kotlin experience
No Spring ecosystem expertise: zero mention of Spring, Spring Boot, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise Java frameworks required for the role
Recent focus misaligned: last 3+ years at re:cinq and Optilyz focused on TypeScript/Node.js full-stack development, not JVM/IDE tooling
